__comment__: This file was automatically created by mcresources
name: 農作物

pages.text: 農作物是食物和其他一些材料的來源。雖然每種作物都略有不同，但其實都大同小異。要種植農作物，你需要先找一些$(thing)種子$()，破壞$(l:the_world/wild_crops)野生作物$()可以就得到一點。$(br2)有了種子，你還需要一把$(thing)鋤$()。種子也可以作為$(l:mechanics/fishing)魚餌$()。

In addition to finding wild crops, seeds can also be produced from existing crops. When a fully mature crop dies - either by weather, or leaving it to rot - it will go to seed, dropping more seeds that can be used to grow even more crops next season.
To get started, a $(thing)Stone Hoe$() can be $(thing)knapped$() as seen above.
塑型完畢的鋤頭就可以合成鋤了.$(br2)鋤的作用和傳統Minecraft相同, 右鍵點選泥土方塊就可以把它變成$(thing)耕地$(). 他們也可以把$(thing)纏根泥土$()轉換成$(thing)泥土$().

All crops need to be planted on $(l:mechanics/farmland)farmland $()in order to grow. Some crops have additional requirements such as being waterlogged or requiring a stick to grow on.$(br2)Crops do not need $(thing)nutrients$() to grow, but they certainly help. There are three nutrients: $(b)Nitrogen$(), $(6)Phosphorous$(), and $(d)Potassium$(). Each crop may consume, or replenish, and combination of these three nutrients.
pages.title: Growing Crops

pages.text: Consuming nutrients causes a crop to grow faster, and improves the yield of the crop at harvest time. That means that crops that consumed more nutrients drop more food when broken! Consuming nutrients also increases the rate at which the crop replenishes other nutrients.

While each individual crop may have its own balance of fertilizer needs, most crops fit into four general categories: cereals, legumes, vegetables, and cover crops.$(br2)$(bold)Cereals$() consume large amounts of $(b)Nitrogen$(), but replenish $(6)Phosphorous$() and $(d)Potassium$(). They produce food rich in Grain
pages.title: Crop Categories

pages.text: $(bold)Legumes$() produce large amounts of $(b)Nitrogen$(), and consume $(b)Nitrogen$() and $(d)Potassium$(). They produce foods rich in Vegetable and Protein.$(br2)$(bold)Vegetables$() consume all three nutrients to produce foods rich in Vegetable.$(br2)$(bold)Cover$() crops produce all three nutrients, but their produce has only limited uses.

Unlike most cereal grains, rice requires an even balance of nutrients.
pages.title: 水稻

pages.text: 種植水稻種子的方塊必須$(thing)含水$().

If the pumpkin blocks are harvested, and the plant matures again, it can grow more pumpkins. Pumpkins can be made into $(l:mechanics/lighting#jack_o_lanterns)Jack 'o Lanterns$().

pages.text: $(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)Temperature$(): -35 - 17 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)Hydration$(): 20 - 75 %$(br)$(bold)Category$(): Cover$(br)$(br)$(bold)$(b)N: +30 $(bold)$(6)P: +60 $(bold)$(d)K: +100$()$(br)Canola is a single block crop adapted to cold temperatures. Canola seeds can be planted on farmland and will produce $(thing)Canola$() and $(thing)Canola Seeds$() as a product, while enriching the soil. Canola can be used as a source of straw, or compost, and the seeds can be used for oil.

pages.text: $(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)Temperature$(): -33 - 21 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)Hydration$(): 30 - 90 %$(br)$(bold)Category$(): Cover$(br)$(br)$(bold)$(b)N: +50 $(bold)$(6)P: +100 $(bold)$(d)K: +60$()$(br)Radishes are a single block crop adapted to cold temperatures. Radish seeds can be planted on farmland and will produce $(thing)Radishes$() and $(thing)Radish Seeds$() as a product, while enriching the soil. Radishes are not a very nutritious vegetable, but can be fed to many animals.

Sugarcane can be used to make $(thing)Sugar$().
